Cuộc thi Toán Tiếng Anh VEMC
Pro


Share

Use GitHub connector if available. Repository with all history and submissions: https://github.com/lequoctran181/IMC_Challenge_2026
Problem: IMC Challenge 2026 simplifygeometry. Need C++17 Kattis solution that reads modified OBJ mesh V F, v x y z, f a b c, outputs a closed manifold nondegenerate triangular mesh. Constraints include vertex-Hausdorff only over vertices (clarification: a,b vary over vertices, not surface interiors), symmetric distance <= 5% AABB diagonal, visual 6 axial camera SSIM normal+depth must stay valid, objective minimize output vertices. Current best is only about 81.938904; target is 91.80+ / top 1. Many recent attempts are bad: hashes 14e891=15.66, ece38=59.78, 445077=15.41, cd08=46.58, cbf3=38.26, e33ad=16.36, 6199=38.45, a75bab=29.76, many plateau attempts 81.93457. Do not make small variants of those.
Think deeply and implement a fresh breakthrough approach. You must return an ACTUAL downloadable C++ file named submission_next.cpp, plus a full standalone C++17 code block fallback if file download is unavailable. It must compile with g++ -O2 -std=c++17 and pass official sample first line 8 12. Do not stop with prose, sources, or analysis only; produce ready-to-submit code/file.

Show more
